title: No More Darkness
description: A simple client-side mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11 that grants the player permanent night vision without particles while they are logged in.
body:
A simple client-side mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11 that grants the player permanent night vision without particles while they are logged in. **Only for singleplayer mode!**

_After drinking milk, dying, or moving to another world, the effect remains._

Source code: **https://github.com/XdartMc/NoMoreDarkness**

**TESTED ONLY ON 1.21.11! RECOMMENDED FABRIC 0.18.4**
